mapper.insert: INSERT INTO aid_error_log (task_id, provider_code, model_code, http_status, raw_message, matched_rule_id, matched_error_code, occurrence_count, sample_hash, first_seen, last_seen) VALUES (#{taskId}, #{providerCode}, #{modelCode}, #{httpStatus}, #{rawMessage}, #{matchedRuleId}, #{matchedErrorCode}, 1, #{sampleHash}, NOW(), NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE occurrence_count = occurrence_count + 1, last_seen = NOW(), http_status = VALUES(http_status), raw_message = VALUES(raw_message), matched_rule_id = VALUES(matched_rule_id), matched_error_code = VALUES(matched_error_code), task_id = VALUES(task_id), model_code = VALUES(model_code)
